path: Problem: Return one of two fixed results depending on which of two mutually exclusive input cells contains a number (and avoid divide-by-zero/blank errors when the other cell is empty)
Action: Nested IF with AND tests; use N() to coerce/check numeric input and "" checks for blank cells
Observation: When exactly one of the two input cells is populated per row, mutually exclusive AND conditions can safely route to the correct output and return blank otherwise
